elements.sent-2411-135: Thanks to \eqref{hypf and \eqref{hopf one has \begin{equation}\label{tildef} \begin{split} \tilde{f}(\cdot, t) \le c_1(\max\{u,t\})^{-\gamma}+c_2(\max\{u,t\})^{r} \le c_1u^{-\gamma}+c_2(u^r+t^r) \le c_1(\eta d^{s_1})^{-\gamma}+c_2 (\max_{\overline{\Omega}}u)^r+ c_2 t^r \le C_1(d^{-\gamma s_1}+t^r+1),\;\; t\in\R^+. \end{split}\end{equation} The energy functional $\tilde{J :W^{s_1,p _0(\Omega)\to\R$ associated with the problem \begin{equation}\label{frizedprob} \left\{ \begin{alignedat}{2} (-\Delta)^{s_1}_p u+(-\Delta)^{s_2}_q u = \tilde f(x,u)+g(x,D^s v) \quad in\;\;\Omega, u =0 \quadin\;\;\R^N\setminus\Omega, \end{alignedat} \right.\end{equation}.}}}}}
elements.formula-2411-091: \begin{equation}\label{tildef}  \tilde{f}(\cdot, t) \le c_1(\max\{u,t\})^{-\gamma}+c_2(\max\{u,t\})^{r} \le c_1u^{-\gamma}+c_2(u^r+t^r) \le c_1(\eta d^{s_1})^{-\gamma}+c_2 (\max_{\overline{\Omega}}u)^r+ c_2 t^r \le C_1(d^{-\gamma s_1}+t^r+1),\;\; t\in\R^+. \end{equation}
elements.sent-2411-137: From \eqref{new , \eqref{hypg , H\"older's inequality, and fractional Hardy’s inequality \cite[Theorem 1.1]{Dy (recall that $s_1p>1$) it follows \begin{equation}\begin{split} \tilde{J}(u) \ge\frac{1}{p} \int_{\R^N\times\R^N}\frac{|u(x)-u(y)|^{p}}{|x-y|^{N+s_1p}}\dx\dy -C_1\int_\Omega d^{-\gamma s_1}|u|\dx -\frac{C_1}{r+1}\int_\Omega |u|^{r+1} \dx -c_3\int_\Omega |D^s v|^\zeta |u|\dx-(C_1+c_3)\int_\Omega |u|\dx \ge\frac{1}{p}\int_{\R^N\times\R^N}\frac{|u(x)-u(y)|^{p}}{|x-y|^{N+s_1p}}\dx\dy -C_1\int_\Omega d^{(p-\gamma)s_1}\frac{|u|}{d^{s_1p}}\dx -\frac{C_1}{r+1}\int_\Omega |u|^{r+1} \dx -c_3\int_\Omega |D^s v|^\zeta |u|\dx-C_2\|u\|_p \ge\frac{1}{p}\|u\|^p_{s_1,p}-C_3(\|u\|_{s_1,p}+\|u\|_p^{r+1}+\|D^sv\|_p^\zeta\|u\|_{\frac{p}{p-\zeta}}+\|u\|_p),\quad u\in W^{s_1,p}_0(\Omega). \end{split}\end{equation} Since $r,\zeta\in (1,p-1)$, through Proposition \ref{fracemb (b) we see that $\tilde{J}$ is coercive.}}}}
elements.formula-2411-093: \begin{equation} \tilde{J}(u) \ge\frac{1}{p} \int_{\R^N\times\R^N}\frac{|u(x)-u(y)|^{p}}{|x-y|^{N+s_1p}}\dx\dy -C_1\int_\Omega d^{-\gamma s_1}|u|\dx -\frac{C_1}{r+1}\int_\Omega |u|^{r+1} \dx -c_3\int_\Omega |D^s v|^\zeta |u|\dx-(C_1+c_3)\int_\Omega |u|\dx \ge\frac{1}{p}\int_{\R^N\times\R^N}\frac{|u(x)-u(y)|^{p}}{|x-y|^{N+s_1p}}\dx\dy -C_1\int_\Omega d^{(p-\gamma)s_1}\frac{|u|}{d^{s_1p}}\dx -\frac{C_1}{r+1}\int_\Omega |u|^{r+1} \dx -c_3\int_\Omega |D^s v|^\zeta |u|\dx-C_2\|u\|_p \ge\frac{1}{p}\|u\|^p_{s_1,p}-C_3(\|u\|_{s_1,p}+\|u\|_p^{r+1}+\|D^sv\|_p^\zeta\|u\|_{\frac{p}{p-\zeta}}+\|u\|_p),\quad u\in W^{s_1,p}_0(\Omega). \end{equation}
elements.sent-2411-138: Lemma \ref{torsionproblem and the inequality $g(x,\xi)\geq0$ produce \begin{equation}\langle(-\Delta)^{s_1}_pu+(-\Delta)^{s_2}_qu,\phi\rangle \leq\int_\Omega f(\cdot,u)\phi\dx \le\int_\Omega f(\cdot,u)\phi\dx+\int_\Omega g(\cdot,D^s v)\phi\dx.\end{equation}.}
elements.sent-2411-139: Therefore, by $({\rm p _1)$ and \eqref{deftildef , \begin{equation}\begin{split} \langle(-\Delta)^{s_1}_p u-(-\Delta)^{s_1}_p u_v,\phi\rangle \le\langle(-\Delta)^{s_1}_p u-(-\Delta)^{s_1}_p u_v,\phi\rangle +\langle(-\Delta)^{s_2}_qu-(-\Delta)^{s_2}_{q} u_v,\phi\rangle \le\int_{\Omega(u_v<u)}(f(\cdot,u)-\tilde{f}(\cdot,u_v)) (u-u_v)\dx = \int_{\Omega(u_v<u)}(f(\cdot,u)-f(\cdot,u))(u-u_v)\dx=0. \end{split}\end{equation} Now, Lemma 9 in \cite{LL forces \begin{equation}0<u\le u_v.\end{equation}.}}}
